---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a template, connector, region, or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
---

**What you want**
The template / connector / region / change you are proposing.

**Why**
The problem it solves or the gap it fills.

**Notes**
If this touches a hard gate (diagnosis-first, the post-render audit,
append-only data) or the docxtpl render path, explain why the change is
safe — see CONTRIBUTING.md.
